column1: C[csobod: You have thirteen handicap moves.

C[Gentleman Gin: You should, hopefully by now, know that I'm shit at this game. Also, I'm not going to get very far into it before I pass out drunk, thought I do like the idea of being able to keep a game going with you for the next couple days.
C[csobod: Aye. We'll fix your go over time. It won't happen over night. And I just feel this is pretty convinient.
C[Gentleman Gin: We'll have a true game in two weeks.

C[csobod: Aye. You know what we should do? We should take a booth at The Mills with my board and stones in tow, and play drinking Go. Every time you capture a group of four or more stones, that's a shot of alcohol. Resignation is chugging a full pint.
C[Gentleman Gin: That sounds mild compared to my drinking games.
csobod: I know, but if I try your drinking games I'll die.

C[Gentleman Gin: I'll get this out of the air now: I like ponies, like My Little Pony, and I've discovered a huge drinking culture built up around it. And yeah, drinking while doing that shit almost kills me.
csobod: Because, if so, that could be the only thing you could say that would shock me. And I'll give it a shot with you sometime.
Gentleman Gin: I feel like I have decent reasons for liking the show. Mostly that all the bright colors and happiness were in complete contrast with the shit I went through everyday.

C[Gentleman Gin: No, it's not sad. Ponies are usually just the neckbeards' way of making friends. And if you're not a neckbeard, than ponies are a happy sort of thing. THere's a whole community that grew up around drinking and watching ponies.
Gentleman Gin: I mean, I enjoy drinking and watching a lot of things, but to find over a hundred people who just want to drink and watch ponies, at the same time, it's fun.
C[Gentleman Gin: Anyway, I'm going to bed now. Can't drive to work drunk like I did this morning, terrible experience. Luckily, I'm not actually doing work, just working on getting out of the navy.

csobod: Huh, well that's not so bad. I obsessively rewatch the some 75 episodes of Hikaru no Go, a suspiciously homosexual show about a juvenille's obsession with another boy the same age for the sake of ""meeting [his\] rival in combat.""
csobod: Goodnight, man. I'll probably play throughout the day tomorrow. It works in Chrome on Android, btw.
csobod: Which is why the Submit button is ther.e
Gentleman Gin: It better work on android, probably the only way I would ever play. These bastards need an android app.
csobod: They're in beta for one right now, it's going to release in like a month.
csobod: They were in alpha only three or four weeks ago, so it's moving along pretty well. There's a lot of daily updates and feature additions every week.
csobod: Anyway man, goodnight. I'll talk to you soon. I'm glad you made it through all of this.
C[csobod: You can actually plan conditional moves in Nova, too. So if you think your opponent is going to respond somewhere, you can plan out your response in advance.
C[csobod: Around when you're going to be back, we're going to have a Go instructor hosted at the RHPL. He'll be visiting at least once a month, for like one four hour class a month.
C[csobod: Alright, so the upper right group needs two eyes. There's two places you can play inside the group that will make two eyes.
